underlying_goal: Create phase 41 planning files, but got sidetracked fixing git branch/merge issues with phase 40
friction_detail: Claude started phase 41 work on main branch instead of detecting unmerged phase 40 branch first; user had to flag the branch issue.
brief_summary: User wanted to plan phase 41 but discovered they were on wrong branch; Claude helped merge phase 40 PR and create phase 41 branch, but original planning task was deferred.
